sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76708" key="paiste/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παισ-τέον</orth>, <sense id="n76708.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must play</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0497.tlg001:46:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pl.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">46.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
